{{Quote|'Gundark'—through extensive contacts—has been a major arms dealer, specializing in military-grade weapons and explosives. The apprehension and incarceration of this criminal should be made a top priority.|[[Corellian Security Force|CorSec]] evaluation of Gundark|<ref name="Gundark" />}}
'''Gundark''' was the alias of an [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] who led [[Gundark Arms Ring|his own arms ring]] and published the illegal datalog ''[[Gundark's Gear Datalog]]''. He operated primarily in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], having been spotted on [[Elshandruu Pica]], in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]], and the [[Parmic sector/Legends|Parmic sector]]. Gundark dealt in military weapons, military explosives, and stolen goods, and was suspected of having been involved with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] at one time. His heavy build suggested a background on a high-gravity [[Planet/Legends|world]], and his face was concealed at all times by a sunvisor or goggles.<ref name="Gundark" />
